title: Simple command boundary
task: Show the current Git branch and latest commit summary.
context: The user only needs a direct local command result, not a multi-skill workflow.

route.path: Simple task > Direct command > No router expansion
route.reason: A simple status request should be answered directly without loading unrelated skills.

omitted_skills.reason: The user did not ask to complete or release the branch.

public_safety.review_notes: Boundary case uses generic Git status language.
